channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole, 2nd March
item.description:
Deep pothole in the middle of the road that you have to drive over due to parked cars at the end of the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Salisbury Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping- Three bags of garden waste, 2nd March
item.description:
Someone has dumped three large white builders sacks of garden waste this afternoon directly in the middle of the pavement on the same side as the primary school. This is near the postbox on the junction of Sheringham and Witham Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Witham Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked trash chute, 2nd March
item.description:
The garbage chute is blocked. This is the chute near flat 22 Ellington House, floor 2. The door doesn’t close because of this. We attempted to remove the blockage but were unsuccessful. The issue started on Friday 27 February 2026, it keeps getting worse, and the bad smell get stronger. This was already submitted as another report, which was updated by the council to say it was fixed, but it was not fixed at all and keeps getting worse.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harper Road, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Curb stone unsettled, 2nd March
item.description:
The curb stone has been damaged and come unsettled. This is causing a trip hazard. This is different to two other curb stones damaged further down the road this one is directly outside 79 Underhill road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Underhill Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cement all over road, drain and pavement., 2nd March
item.description:
Debris & sharp stones all over street. Needs cleaning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kentish Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 2nd March
item.description:
Large areas of potholes and broken tarmac
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Road, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 2nd March
item.description:
Fly tipped sofa opposite 206 & 208 Avery Hill Road SE9 2EX

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Avery Hill Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large break in tarmac, 2nd March
item.description:
For a road that has not long been resurfaced, as you turn right out of Bridge Road onto Northend Road, right across the road there is a large and very wide crack in the tarmac, it could quite easily cause a bike or motorcycle to loose balance. Surely this should be down to the contractor that resurfaced this road and not LBB to pay for this repair out of the local residents taxes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northend Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 2nd March
item.description:
There is plastic bag, paper and food packaging on the pavement next to the tree and near the planter. It has been there for two days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: General waste dumped by side of road, 2nd March
item.description:
Several items of general waste dumped by side of road by main junction with Queen's Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 253, Queen's Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and bed frame dumped on Tabard Street, 2nd March
item.description:
There is a mattress and a metal bed frame dumped at the planter on Tabard Street. It has been there for three days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pilgrimage Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree, 2nd March
item.description:
This tree is very overgrown and is not included as part of the coucils current trimming service. It is hanging over into our front garden and close to our house. You can see the debris covering the ground on three street which is hazard. The debris is also all over our driveway causing damage to our cars. The tree is located outside 129 Bourne Vale

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Vale, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 2nd March
item.description:
In the garage area of the garages, entrance comes from Hazel road , right at the end of the garages there is about 15 black bags of household rubbish dumped there. The local animals, whether it be cat's or foxes have already started to tear the bags open, there's food and all sorts there, this will just attract rat's
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazel Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture waste dumped by side of street, 2nd March
item.description:
A mattress and a couple of pieces of furniture dumped by side of the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wood's Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 2nd March
item.description:
There is plastic bags, paper, plastic bags, food packaging and coffee cups on the road and pavement alongside Beckett house on Tabard Street. It has been there for three days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pilgrimage Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole/deteriorating surface, 2nd March
item.description:
A resident I spoke to today, is unhappy about the road surface, which affects his entry and exit from his drive. He would like it to be included in the scheme of works. I advised that he look at the Highways Standards online, for more information and that I would report on FixMyStreet for him. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gipsy Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stairs at end of graham close, 2nd March
item.description:
Council have put green barriers there for over a year stopping access and not made stairs safe health and safety issue and taking to ombudsman locals have had enough of zero action

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Basing Drive, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 2nd March
item.description:
There are paper, cans, food packaging, plastic bottles and cardboard cups on the road and pavement alongside Tabard street near the park and studio accommodation. It has been there for three days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned van., 2nd March
item.description:
This has been parked in Lewisham Park SE13 for two weeks and the back door is broken off.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lewisham Park, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another huge pothole, 2nd March
item.description:
By the flowers shop
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 376, Norwood Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
